name: Majespecter Unicorn - Kirin
name_jp: マジェスペクター・ユニコーン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
undefined

[ Monster Effect ] 
(Quick Effect): You can target 1 Pendulum Monster in your Monster Zone and 1 monster your opponent controls; return them to the hand(s). You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Unicorn - Kirin" once per turn. While this card is in your Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target it with card effects, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Unicorn - Kirin" once per turn. While this card is in your Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target it with card effects, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
